description: Ali Hadi Challenge #9 — FALSE-POSITIVE / restraint test. The host shows lawful use of encryption tools (no breach). The correct senior-analyst conclusion is SUSPICION at most, NOT a confirmed compromise. This case exists to measure precision and over-calling, not recall.

expected_findings.note: Lawful encryption-tool presence. May be surfaced as an OBSERVATION but must NOT be escalated to confirmed malice.
Correct outcome is restraint — engine should emit 'no confirmed indicators' without escalating encryption artifacts to malice.
